notes: Environment degradation persists: WebFetch/curl return 403 for nearly every external domain tried (vendor blogs, HN, X, YouTube RSS, aggregators, simonwillison.net, latent.space, oneusefulthing.org) — discovery relied entirely on WebSearch, cross-checked independently for each of the 4 news items and 4 expert-content items before inclusion. yt-dlp/imageio-ffmpeg were pip-installed at the start of this run (absent from the base image) but streaming access to YouTube itself remains blocked by the egress proxy, so video frame extraction failed for both processed videos as in prior runs. Expert section reached 4 of 5 minimum (min_expert_total) despite extensive expansion across all configured experts plus one additional author — several configured video experts (Karpathy, Latent Space, Wolfe, Mollick, Nate Herk) had no qualifying new content in the 7-day window this run.
